title: No cheats upgraded modpack
description:
A modpack with better biomes and structures + waystones !
Un modpack avec des biomes & structures améliorées + des waystones !
body:
This modpack is for you if you always use the "open to LAN" button ! It does not disable this button, but it disables the allow cheats button in the LAN opening GUI.
This modpack upgrades structures too, with overhauled villages, magnificent structures like the desert temple which has turned into a giant pyramid, the stronghold which is a giant underground fortress with a portal room which is more beautiful than before !
Two Waystones mods are installed on the modpack too : Waystones, and Wraith Waystones ! So, you can find more than one waystone in a village, maybe two or three ! Maybe more !
It adds decorations blocks with the Supplementaries and Amendments blocks !
BetterEnd and BetterNether adds a lot of biomes in the two dimensions to make them beaaaautiiifuuuul !
And finally, a lot of functionalities are added to the game !
Enjoy your game and explore the world without commands !
Let's goooo !
